series_metadata.series_title: Audio and Working Notes from Stated Board and Committee Meetings
series_metadata.series_description: Audio recordings and working notes for purposes of transcribing minutes of stated Board meetings and Board committee meetings.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain working notes until minutes of the associated meeting are approved by the Board. ; Electronic: Retain audio until minutes of the associated meeting are approved by the Board., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Erase
